creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
To really get this fixed on e.g. powerpc64, they depend on qt-dist.mk patch.

That said, I don't want to block committing those fixes before qt-dist.mk patch, since they do no harm on amd64 and still fix it when qt-dist.mk is patched.
